heading_content_part: BY INSTALLING, USING, REGISTERING TO OR OTHERWISE ACCESSING THE SERVICES, YOU AGREE TO THIS PRIVACY POLICY AND GIVE AN EXPLICIT AND INFORMED CONSENT TO THE PROCESSING OF YOUR PERSONAL DATA IN ACCORDANCE WITH THIS PRIVACY POLICY. IF YOU DO NOT AGREE TO THIS PRIVACY POLICY, PLEASE DO NOT INSTALL, USE, REGISTER TO OR OTHERWISE ACCESS THE SERVICES. t3leem reserves the right to modify this Privacy Policy at reasonable times, so please review it frequently. If t3leem makes material or significant changes to this Privacy Policy, t3leem may post a notice on t3leem’s website along with the updated Privacy Policy. Your continued use of Services will signify your acceptance of the changes to this Privacy Policy.

heading_content_part: Please note that certain features of the Services may be able to connect to your social networking sites to obtain additional information about you. In such cases, t3leem may be able to collect certain information from your social networking profile when your social networking site permits it, and when you consent to allow your social networking site to make that information available to t3leem. This information may include, but is not limited to, your name, profile picture, gender, user ID, email address, your country, your language, your time zone, the organizations and links on your profile page, the names and profile pictures of your social networking site “friends” and other information you have included in your social networking site profile. t3leem may associate and/or combine as well as use information collected by t3leem and/or obtained through such social networking sites in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

heading_content_part: Personal data may, however, occasionally be disclosed in accordance with applicable legislation and this Privacy Policy. Additionally, t3leem may disclose personal data to its parent companies and its subsidiaries in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

decoder_heading: Personal data may, however, occasionally be disclosed in accordance with applicable legislation
ident_heading: Personal data may, however, occasionally be disclosed in accordance with applicable legislation
heading_content_part: t3leem may hire agents and contractors to collect and process personal data on t3leem’s behalf and in such cases such agents and contractors will be instructed to comply with our Privacy Policy and to use personal data only for the purposes for which the third party has been engaged by t3leem. These agents and contractors may not use your personal data for their own marketing purposes. t3leem may use third party service providers such as credit card processors, e-mail service providers, shipping agents, data analyzers and business intelligence providers. t3leem has the right to share your personal data as necessary for the aforementioned third parties to provide their services for t3leem. t3leem is not liable for the acts and omissions of these third parties, except as provided by mandatory law.

decoder_heading: Personal data may, however, occasionally be disclosed in accordance with applicable legislation
ident_heading: Personal data may, however, occasionally be disclosed in accordance with applicable legislation
heading_content_part: t3leem may disclose your personal data to third parties as required by law enforcement or other government officials in connection with an investigation of fraud, intellectual property infringements, or other activity that is illegal or may expose you or t3leem to legal liability. t3leem may also disclose your personal data to third parties when t3leem has a reason to believe that a disclosure is necessary to address potential or actual injury or interference with t3leem’s rights, property, operations, users or others who may be harmed or may suffer loss or damage, or t3leem believes that such disclosure is necessary to protect t3leem ’s rights, combat fraud and/or comply with a judicial proceeding, court order, or legal process served on t3leem. To the extent permitted by applicable law, t3leem will make reasonable efforts to notify you of such disclosure through t3leem’s website or in another reasonable manner.

decoder_heading: Safeguards
ident_heading: Safeguards
heading_content_part: Safeguards

decoder_heading: t3leem follows generally accepted industry standards and maintains reasonable safeguards
ident_heading: t3leem follows generally accepted industry standards and maintains reasonable safeguards
heading_content_part: t3leem follows generally accepted industry standards and maintains reasonable safeguards to attempt to ensure the security, integrity and privacy of the information in t3leem’s possession. Only those persons with a need to process your personal data in connection with the fulfillment of their tasks in accordance with the purposes of this Privacy Policy and for the purposes of performing technical maintenance, have access to your personal data in t3leem’s possession. Personal data collected by t3leem is stored in secure operating environments that are not available to the public. To prevent unauthorized on-line access to personal data, t3leem maintains personal data behind a firewall-protected server. However, no system can be 100% secure and there is the possibility that despite t3leem’s reasonable efforts, there could be unauthorized access to your personal data. By using the Services, you assume this risk.

ident_heading: t3leem takes children’s privacy seriously
heading_content_part: t3leem takes children’s privacy seriously, and encourages parents and/or guardians to play an active role in their children's online experience at all times. t3leem does not knowingly collect any personal information from children below the aforementioned age and if t3leem learns that t3leem has inadvertently gathered personal data from children under the aforementioned age, t3leem will take reasonable measures to promptly erase such personal data from t3leem’s records.

decoder_heading: t3leem takes children’s privacy seriously

heading_content_part: t3leem regularly reviews its compliance with this Privacy Policy. If t3leem receives a formal written complaint from you, it is t3leem’s policy to attempt to contact you directly to address any of your concerns. t3leem will cooperate with the appropriate governmental authorities, including data protection authorities, to resolve any complaints regarding the collection, use, transfer or disclosure of personal data that cannot be amicably resolved between you and t3leem.
